description:
A time tracker and timesheet app that lets you track work hours across projects.


- (Improvement) Web and Windows app sessions are now separated, so logging out from the web doesn't log you out of the Windows app.
- (Improvement) The time entry details window is automatically refreshed when any entity (project, task, tag, or client) is modified on the web.
- (Fix) Owners and Admins were unable to duplicate locked entries.
- (Fix) Pressing "Enter" in the description field did not start the timer.
- (Fix) 400 error when typing a square bracket in the tags picker.
- (Fix) Wrong billable value saved when editing an existing entry.
- (Fix) Description text was cut off when the font size was increased at the OS level.
- Other bug fixes and performance improvements.
